creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
Beech Rintoul <beech@alaskaparadise.com> wrote:

> I'm working on updating the port and will probably take 
> maintainership. The problem is fetch and FTP both fail from their 
> server. I managed to finally download the distfile, but I can't 
> mirror it due to author restriction. If you're trying to get the 
> distfile you can download it from 
> http://www.alaskaparadise.com/freebsd/tinker.tar.gz but I can't 
> publish it till I receive permission from the author.

I can fetch it from the original site and confirmed it was the same file as ports expects.
